hadith-eng: Abu Umamah, and other than him from the Companions of the Prophet (ﷺ), narrated that the Prophet (ﷺ) said:"Any Muslim man who frees a Muslim man, then it is his salvation from the Fire - each of his limbs suffices for a limb of himself. And any Muslim woman that frees a Muslim woman, then she is her salvation from the Fire - each of her limb suffices for a limb of herself

hadith-eng: Narrated 'Abdur-Rahman bin Samurah:That the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said: "O 'Abdur-Rahman! Do not ask for a position of leadership, for if you receive it due to asking, you will be left alone with it, and if you receive it without asking, then you will be aided in it. verification_reason: The narration suggests that divine assistance is more likely to be provided when one does not seek leadership roles, implying that seeking leadership can lead to being left alone with the responsibility.
